title: Optical Neural Networks: Photonic Computing
author: Nova Bennett
Photonics Engineer
description: Train neural networks with light—but fabrication errors limit accuracy
content:
Optical neural networks perform matrix multiplication at the speed of light.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Coherence Loss (2042)](/docs/articles/coherence-loss-2042)
